items.title: [正面] Redoing this review. When I wrote it, I was suffer...
items.summary: Redoing this review. When I wrote it, I was suffering horribly from the difficulty level of this game, which is EXTREMELY difficult. However, I cannot recommend this enough, with the caveat that it is a gacha and thus exploitative. This has some of the best takes on the Cthulhu Mythos I have seen in ANY game, as well as fantastic characters and worldbuilding on their own right. The artstyle is stunning. The gameplay is difficult but incredibly engaging and fun. While parts are still machine-translated, the developers are actively working on fixing it and extremely responsive/friendly to players. Though not released in it, this is almost certainly my GOTY of 2025.

items.title: [正面] 没有玩过二游，但这个我玩的很舒服，抽卡抽的很舒服，不肝不氪，角色也很有意思，游戏性上比杀戮尖塔好玩，...
items.summary: 没有玩过二游，但这个我玩的很舒服，抽卡抽的很舒服，不肝不氪，角色也很有意思，游戏性上比杀戮尖塔好玩，还有pvp，剧情还可以，保证尺度同时埋了很多克苏鲁背景和致敬，就是角色互动比较少，网络不稳定都是可以接受

items.title: [正面] Playing this on phone as it's more convenient, but...
items.summary:
Playing this on phone as it's more convenient, but felt deserving of the good review.

Pros:
-JP va are pretty good
-Generous with pulls, have over 100+ standard pulls from initial start, with more coming as I clear more story content.
-"Slay the spire" esque gameplay loop where the cards are the gacha characters.
-Varying but clear archetypes and character builds provide a lot of variation to gameplay.
-Augmenting and relic systems also lets you tailor your deck to different types of combat.
-Story is quite interesting and has some mystery to it.

~:
-Story is translated through ChatGPT, mostly readable. but may miss that flair of certain lore drops.

Cons:
-UI could be better for upgrading units, viewing units (on mobile). Some cards have a lot of text which look tiny on mobile.
-Dungeons may be a bit long but are good for short bursts.
-Gameplay may get samey if you play the same characters constantly.
